title: Battle of Kashyyyk (disambiguation)
content:
The '''Battle of Kashyyyk''' can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*The [[Rebellion on Kashyyyk]]
*[[Battle of Kashyyyk]] during the [[Clone Wars]]
*[[Liberation on Kashyyyk]], a mission undertaken by [[Cal Kestis]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge]].
*[[Liberation of Kashyyyk]] during the [[Galactic Civil War]]
*[[Blockade of Kashyyyk]] during the [[First Order-Resistance War]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*A '''[[Rebellion on Kashyyyk/Legends|rebellion]]''' during the [[Jedi Civil War]]
*The '''[[Battle of Kashyyyk (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Kashyyyk]]''' in the [[New Sith Wars]].
*A '''[[Battle of Kashyyyk (Farfalla)|battle]]''' involving [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] and [[Valenthyne Farfalla]].
*The '''[[Kashyyyk Trade Rebellion]]''' during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]

===[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]===
:*[[Attack on Kashyyyk|Separatist-Trandoshan Attack on Kashyyyk]]
:*[[Mission to Kashyyyk (Mort)|Mort's Mission to Kashyyyk]]
:*[[Mission to Kashyyyk (Clone Wars)|Delta Squad's Mission to Kashyyyk]]
:*[[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]]

:*[[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)]]
:*[[Battle of Kashyyyk (c. 18 BBY)]]
:*[[Mission to Kashyyyk (Great Jedi Purge)|Mission to Kashyyyk]]

===[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]===
:*The [[assault on Kashyyyk]]
:*[[Prison Break on Kashyyyk]]
:*[[Rescue from Stars' End]]
:*[[Attack on the Kashyyyk outpost]]
:*[[Blockade of Kashyyyk (1 ABY)|Blockade of Kashyyyk]]
:*[[Rebel Invasion of Kashyyyk]]
:*[[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|Liberation of Kashyyyk]]
:*[[Mission to Kashyyyk (Thrawn campaign)]]

===[[Nagai–Tof War]]===
:*[[Skirmish on Kashyyyk (Nagai invasion)|Skirmish on Kashyyyk]]

===[[Second Imperium Crisis]]===
:*[[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Imperium Crisis)|Battle of Kashyyyk]]

===[[Second Galactic Civil War]]===
:*[[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]]
